about.title: About Global Businesswomen Council
about.description: Global Businesswomen Council (GBWC) is a dialogue platform aimed at expanding business opportunities and implementing investment projects in various social sectors.
about.missionText: To provide women with access to emerging international markets, create investment opportunities, foster business partnerships, and establish effective communication.
about.goalText: Building the capacity of women and developing international business in the name of building a better world.
about.members: GBWC unites influential women from Central Asia, the Persian Gulf, Southeast Asia, Africa, Europe and America
about.composition: Composition includes women investors, international business leaders and women politicians
about.participants: Participants include women investors, politicians and global influencers
about.activities: GBWC provides investment opportunities, expands business and cross-border projects, implements social initiatives
about.secretariat: The GBWC Secretariat ensures coordination and support of platform activities
about.founder: Founder: Zhanna Baidasheva, founder of GBWC and the Kazakhstan Foreign Investors Council Association
